{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Lindon's dream construct
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Kelsa]] has [[Lindon's dream construct]] tied to her wrist.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
